title: On the sub-Riemannian geometry of the quaternionic Heisenberg group
author_string: Joonhyung Kim, Ioannis D. Platis, Li-Jie Sun
abstract: Utilizing the framework of quaternionic contact geometry, we define a sequence of Riemannian metrics $\{g_L\}$ on the quaternionic Heisenberg group $\mathfrak{H}_{\mathbb{H}}$ by rescaling the vertical directions. By analyzing the limit of this sequence, we characterize the Carnot-Carathéodory geodesics and provide the explicit description of the Carnot-Carathéodory distance and spheres in $\mathfrak{H}_{\mathbb{H}}$ . Furthermore, we derive a general formula for the horizontal mean curvature of hypersurfaces.
